title: Ulta Ulta Hoon Masti Mein
card_subtitle: Baccha sabko chidha ke khud hi khush ho jaata hai
lyrics:
[verse 1]
Doodh piyega ulta glass
*chhapaak* gir gaya pass
Chappal peheni left foot
*thapp* ye kya hua boot?

[chorus]
Ulta ulta hoon masti mein
Sabko chidha ke hansi mein
Duniya dekhe aise jaise
Main hoon gubbare jaisa!

[verse 2]
Papa ka moochh banana
*dhadaam* gir gaya banana
School bag utha ke dhokha
*phiss* bhookhe pet ka jhoka!

[chorus]
Ulta ulta hoon masti mein
Sabko chidha ke hansi mein
Duniya dekhe aise jaise
Main hoon gubbare jaisa!

[ending]
Ab thak gaya *haaah*
Ulta hi so jaaun *ghurrr*
